name: Northern Shield Resources Inc.
summary: Northern Shield Resources Inc., a natural resource company, engages in identifying, acquiring, and exploring mineral properties primarily in Eastern Canada. The company principally explores for nickel, copper, gold, and platinum group elements. It holds interest in the Huckleberry property covering an area of 54 km sq located in north of Schefferville; 100% interest in the Idefix property situated in Labrador Trough, Qu√É¬©bec; and a 50% interest in the Shot Rock property located in Nova Scotia. The company also holds interest in the Merasheen property that consists of two licenses, as well as an option agreement to earn a 100% interest in an adjacent license covering an area of 27 square kilometers on Merasheen Island in Placentia Bay, Newfoundland. In addition, it has an option agreement to acquire 100% interest in the Root & Cellar property. Northern Shield Resources Inc. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Ottawa, Canada.
